title: 3 Things Funded Traders Check Before GDP (Most Traders Miss #2)
description: GDP drops this week and most traders will get wrecked. Here are 3 things the R2F Trading system checks before any high-impact news event. Follow r2ftrading.com for daily ICT setups.
script: GDP drops this week. Most traders will blow up. Three things to check first. Number one — find the buyside liquidity sitting above price. Smart money hunts that first. Number two — mark the nearest fair value gap. Price revisits it 80% of the time after GDP. Number three — identify the order block below. That's your real entry zone. Not the candle everyone's watching. Follow R2F Trading. New ICT setups every day at r2ftrading.com.
